milestone.title: Character Visual & Equipment System
milestone.description: Dynamic character visual composition system (Sprite Layering pattern) + Equipment ScriptableObject architecture. Enables runtime equipment swapping with visual feedback, animation overrides, VFX profiles, and visual modifiers. Can be worked in parallel with V1 combat issues. Prerequisites for #10 (Loot) and #11 (Equipment).

title: Equipment SO Data Pipeline — Bulk Generation
